evidence.claim: Developed semantic search for 500K documents using sentence-transformers, FAISS, and query expansion
evidence.source_text: Developed a semantic search feature for an internal knowledge base of ~500K documents. Used sentence-transformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2 initially, later upgraded to bge-base) with FAISS for fast nearest-neighbor retrieval. Designed the query expansion module

evidence.claim: Improved search relevance by 35% over Elasticsearch BM25
evidence.source_text: Reported search-relevance improvement of 35% over the prior Elasticsearch BM25 setup, validated through human relevance judgments.

evidence.claim: Trained and shipped ranking models using XGBoost and LightGBM
evidence.source_text: Trained and shipped multiple ranking models for our product's discovery feed using XGBoost and LightGBM.

evidence.claim: Owned offline-online correlation analysis for A/B test outcomes
evidence.source_text: Owned the offline-online correlation analysis that determined which offline metrics actually predicted A/B test outcomes.

evidence.claim: De-facto ML lead on a small team
evidence.source_text: Recently, I've been the de-facto ML lead on a small team, shipping models across NLP and recsys.

evidence.claim: Collaborated with PMs to define optimization targets
evidence.source_text: Worked closely with PMs to define the optimization target (click-through vs. dwell time vs. downstream conversion) — that work was as important as the modeling itself.

evidence.claim: Learned through shipping real systems and production load testing
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Proficiency in various ML tools and frameworks
evidence.source_text: Skills: Image Classification, Data Science, BM25, RAG, FAISS, Object Detection, Embeddings, PyTorch, LoRA, Python, Information Retrieval, pgvector, Learning to Rank, Fine-tuning LLMs, Recommendation Systems, Reinforcement Learning
